$comment: v2 compressed for FLUX schnell URL length limit. Translated from prompts/v2.md via model_dialects/flux-schnell.md. Same intent, ~1700 chars.
prompt: Editorial documentary photograph, 50mm f/2.8 ISO 200, soft window light 4800K from camera right, 1:4 fill ratio with retained shadow modeling. Medium shot waist-up, slight low angle. One Azerbaijani couple ages 28-34 seated by window of modern intercity train. Woman shoulder-length dark brown hair, cream knit sweater no patterns, small gold stud earrings. Man short beard, charcoal henley. Both NOT looking at camera, gazing at view through window. Relaxed posture, no smile teeth, lips closed. Lower-left foreground: red hard-shell suitcase HEX #E31E24, edge-cropped 30%, matte modern. Woman holds smartphone showing abstract red shield silhouette plus 3 horizontal data bars on white background, zero readable text. Man holds navy Azerbaijani passport with folded paper ticket. Outside window: Caucasus railway viaduct, distant mountains, hazy warm daylight, soft atmospheric perspective. Train interior modern Stadler aluminum trim, dark navy fabric seats. Far-left edge 20%: feathered burgundy fade #5C0F12 to transparent, NOT a wash. Window glass: faint transparent shield reflection 12% opacity 120px wide, second-glance only. Upper-left 480x540px calm dark zone for headline. Bottom 180px clean footer zone no faces no hands. Style: Annie Leibovitz portrait + Magnum editorial documentary, NOT lifestyle stock photo. Visible skin pores, natural 5-finger hands, fabric weave, organic ISO 200 film grain. NO text, NO logos, NO watermarks, NO plastic AI skin, NO red wash, NO sci-fi glow, NO cartoon, NO anime, NO extra fingers, NO multiple couples, NO subjects facing camera, NO teeth smile, NO Shutterstock or Getty look.
